main_reason: Records retrieved from IEEE Xplore, ACM Digital Library, SpringerLink, ScienceDirect, and Google Scholar using the SLR search strings and date constraints.
Duplicates and papers below the page-length criterion were removed.
Clearly irrelevant records were removed after title/abstract inspection.
Records not sufficiently related to fairness requirements or AI-based software systems were removed after introduction/conclusion inspection.
Full texts were assessed against inclusion/exclusion criteria and quality requirements.
Final peer-reviewed primary studies retained for coding and synthesis after QA/final corpus boundary audit.
